languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at Nuncius, after which he nods.{/n} "The Tech-Priests of Stygies VIII are most dogged in their acquisition of samples of xenotechnology. Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн смотрит на Нунциуса, после чего кивает.{/n} "Духовенство Стигии VIII весьма настойчиво в делах аквизиции образцов ксеносских технологий. Наша доктрина подразумевает, что любые методы получения преимущества над врагами человечества оправданы, покуда они не переходят за грань ереси. Как вы догадываетесь, где именно проходит эта грань — объект вековых дебатов и раздрая".

{n}Eogunn looks at Nuncius, after which he nods.{/n} "The Tech-Priests of Stygies VIII are most dogged in their acquisition of samples of xenotechnology. Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."

Как вы догадываетесь, где именно проходит эта грань — объект вековых дебатов и раздрая".

Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn mira Nuncius antes de asentir.{/n} «Los tecnosacerdotes de Stygies VIII son muy persistentes en la adquisición de muestras de xenotecnología. De acuerdo con nuestra doctrina, todo método utilizado para obtener una ventaja contra los enemigos de la Humanidad está justificado, siempre y cuando no constituya una herejía. Como puede suponer, la naturaleza exacta de esa línea roja ha sido fuente de debates y discordia durante siglos».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at Nuncius, after which he nods.{/n} "The Tech-Priests of Stygies VIII are most dogged in their acquisition of samples of xenotechnology. Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn mira Nuncius antes de asentir.{/n} «Los tecnosacerdotes de Stygies VIII son muy persistentes en la adquisición de muestras de xenotecnología. De acuerdo con nuestra doctrina, todo método utilizado para obtener una ventaja contra los enemigos de la Humanidad está justificado, siempre y cuando no constituya una herejía. Como puede suponer, la naturaleza exacta de esa línea roja ha sido fuente de debates y discordia durante siglos».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡看了看努恩修斯，然后点了点头。{/n}“斯泰吉斯8号的技术神甫，对于获取异形科技样本，有着近乎偏执的执着。根据我们的教义，只要不越过异端的界限，只要能让我们在与人类之敌的对抗中占据上风，用什么手段都是正当的。你大概也猜到了，关于这条界限究竟在哪里的问题，数百年来一直争论不休。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at Nuncius, after which he nods.{/n} "The Tech-Priests of Stygies VIII are most dogged in their acquisition of samples of xenotechnology. Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡看了看努恩修斯，然后点了点头。{/n}“斯泰吉斯8号的技术神甫，对于获取异形科技样本，有着近乎偏执的执着。根据我们的教义，只要不越过异端的界限，只要能让我们在与人类之敌的对抗中占据上风，用什么手段都是正当的。你大概也猜到了，关于这条界限究竟在哪里的问题，数百年来一直争论不休。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lance un regard à Nuncius, puis hoche la tête.{/n} « Les technoprêtres de Stygies VIII sont les plus obstinés en matière d'acquisition d'échantillons de xénotechnologie. Selon notre doctrine, aucune méthode n'est interdite pour obtenir un avantage sur les ennemis de l'humanité, à moins de franchir la ligne qui nous sépare de l'hérésie. Comme vous l'aurez peut-être deviné, la position exacte de cette ligne est source de discussions et de différends depuis des siècles. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at Nuncius, after which he nods.{/n} "The Tech-Priests of Stygies VIII are most dogged in their acquisition of samples of xenotechnology. Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lance un regard à Nuncius, puis hoche la tête.{/n} « Les technoprêtres de Stygies VIII sont les plus obstinés en matière d'acquisition d'échantillons de xénotechnologie. Selon notre doctrine, aucune méthode n'est interdite pour obtenir un avantage sur les ennemis de l'humanité, à moins de franchir la ligne qui nous sépare de l'hérésie. Comme vous l'aurez peut-être deviné, la position exacte de cette ligne est source de discussions et de différends depuis des siècles. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn wirft einen Blick auf Nuncius und nickt schließlich.{/n} "Die Techpriester von Stygies VIII sind vorwiegend mit der Beschaffung xenotechnologischer Proben beschäftigt. Laut unserer Doktrin sind alle Methoden, die uns einen Vorteil gegenüber den Feinden der Menschheit verschaffen, gerechtfertigt, solange sie die Grenze der Ketzerei nicht überschreiten. Wie Ihr Euch sicher denken könnt, ist die exakte Lage dieser Grenze seit Jahrhunderten ausgesprochen umstritten."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at Nuncius, after which he nods.{/n} "The Tech-Priests of Stygies VIII are most dogged in their acquisition of samples of xenotechnology. Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn wirft einen Blick auf Nuncius und nickt schließlich.{/n} "Die Techpriester von Stygies VIII sind vorwiegend mit der Beschaffung xenotechnologischer Proben beschäftigt. Laut unserer Doktrin sind alle Methoden, die uns einen Vorteil gegenüber den Feinden der Menschheit verschaffen, gerechtfertigt, solange sie die Grenze der Ketzerei nicht überschreiten. Wie Ihr Euch sicher denken könnt, ist die exakte Lage dieser Grenze seit Jahrhunderten ausgesprochen umstritten."

languages.text: {n}エオガンはヌンキウスを見つめ、うなずいた。{/n}「スティージスVIIIの技術司祭は、ゼノテクノロジーのサンプルの獲得に最も執念を燃やしている。我々の教義では、人類の敵に対して優位に立つために用いる方法は、一線を越えて異端とならない限り正当化される。お察しの通り、その一線がどこにあるかは、何世紀にもわたって議論と不和の対象となってきた。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at Nuncius, after which he nods.{/n} "The Tech-Priests of Stygies VIII are most dogged in their acquisition of samples of xenotechnology. Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンはヌンキウスを見つめ、うなずいた。{/n}「スティージスVIIIの技術司祭は、ゼノテクノロジーのサンプルの獲得に最も執念を燃やしている。我々の教義では、人類の敵に対して優位に立つために用いる方法は、一線を越えて異端とならない限り正当化される。お察しの通り、その一線がどこにあるかは、何世紀にもわたって議論と不和の対象となってきた。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, Nuncius'a bakıp ardından başını sallıyor.{/n} "Stygies VIII Tekno Rahipleri, zeno teknolojisi örnekleri elde etme konusunda son derece inatçıdır. Öğretimize göre kâfirlik çizgisini aşmadıkları sürece İnsanlığın düşmanlarına karşı avantaj elde etmek için kullanılan her yöntem mubahtır. Tahmin edebileceğiniz gibi bu çizginin tam olarak nerede olduğu, yüzyıllardır tartışma ve anlaşmazlık konusu olmuştur."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks at Nuncius, after which he nods.{/n} "The Tech-Priests of Stygies VIII are most dogged in their acquisition of samples of xenotechnology. Under our doctrine, any methods used to gain an advantage over the enemies of Humanity are justified, so long as they do not cross the line into heresy. As you may have guessed, where exactly that line lies has been the subject of debate and discord for centuries."
